meta_title: For Students: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no version control (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no version control. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Claude Code Skills Setup for Version Control
content.seo_description: Stop losing code. Learn Claude Code skills setup to master version control and streamline your dev workflow with this beginner-friendly AI builder tutorial.
content.answer_block: To eliminate the risk of losing code, integrate Claude Code with a Git-based workflow. By configuring your environment to automate commits and branch management, you ensure every iteration is tracked. This setup transforms your terminal into a professional-grade development hub, allowing you to focus on building rather than manual backups.
content.intro:
You are staring at a blank terminal, the weight of a broken feature hanging over your project. One wrong command, and your entire progress vanishes into the void because you skipped version control. It is the defining moment that separates hobbyists from professional software engineers: the realization that your code is only as valuable as your ability to recover it.

But the era of manual backups is over. By leveraging Claude Code and Antigravity, you are not just writing code; you are architecting a resilient development pipeline. This guide will show you how to automate your version history so you can experiment fearlessly and build your portfolio with the confidence of a lead developer.

steps.title: Initialize Git Repository
steps.description: Establish a version control foundation. You cannot track changes if the project isn't initialized as a Git repository.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current project directory and generate a .gitignore file tailored for my specific stack to prevent tracking unnecessary build artifacts.

steps.title: Configure Claude Code Environment
steps.description: Connect Claude Code to your local terminal to enable AI-assisted command execution and file management.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Help me configure my Claude Code authentication and verify my current working directory permissions for safe file operations.

steps.title: Automate Branching Strategy
steps.description: Learn to isolate features using branches, ensuring your main codebase remains stable while you experiment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Explain the best branching strategy for a beginner project and generate the command to create a new feature branch.

steps.title: AI-Assisted Commit Messaging
steps.description: Use Claude Code to generate meaningful commit messages that document your progress, a critical skill for any developer portfolio.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review my recent changes and write a professional, concise commit message following the Conventional Commits specification.
steps.claude_code_command: git commit -m 'feat: implement initial project structure'

steps.title: Continuous Syncing
steps.description: Sync your local work to a remote repository, providing an off-site safety net for your hard work.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate the command to push my current branch to the origin repository and set the upstream tracking.

pro_tips: Always use atomic commits: one feature, one commit. It makes debugging exponentially easier.
Use Claude Code to perform 'diff' analysis before you merge to catch logic errors early.
Alias your common Git commands in your shell profile to save time and reduce syntax errors.
Tag your releases using Git tags; it shows recruiters you understand professional deployment lifecycles.
Keep your .gitignore file updated; sensitive environment variables should never touch your repo.
content.next_steps: Once you have successfully versioned your project, deploy it to a hosting provider like Vercel or Netlify to complete the development lifecycle.
content.conversion_block: You now possess the professional tools to manage your code like a senior engineer. Stop fearing the 'delete' key and start shipping features that stand the test of time. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
